title: GridStatus IESO Adequacy Report Forecast
description:
Information on Ontario’s electricity requirements for today through 34 days out. The resources offered, forecasted and bid are included for the hours of today and the next day. 

The value for total resources on outage is the sum of internal outages increased by 2% of available capacity. Available capacity is capacity minus total internal resource outages minus bottled capacity.

For more information on this report, see [this documentation](https://reports-public.ieso.ca/docrefs/helpfile/Adequacy2_h4.pdf) from IESO.
